## Dashboard v2 Architecture
- Card grid layout (not 3-column) — each token is a card, `+` card to add tokens
- Clickable cards expand to show TP/SL controls and close-position button
- Unmanaged position detection — rate existing HL positions, suggest actions
- Activity & Insights notification center — slide-out panel with educational "why" cards
- No chart by default (removed from v1)
- Prototype in prototype-dashboard.jsx (React, visual reference only)
- Production is vanilla HTML/CSS/JS inside DASHBOARD_HTML string in dashboard.py

## Constraints
- Vanilla JS/HTML in dashboard (no frameworks)
- Dashboard HTML lives as inline string in dashboard.py (~line 630)
- Wallet connect HTML uses ethers.js v6 from CDN + dynamic WalletConnect import from esm.sh
- EIP-712 signing for Hyperliquid uses chainId 42161 (Arbitrum), NOT 1337 (HL L1)
- No new dependencies without updating requirements.txt
- templates/ files must be backward compatible with generated workspaces
- Local-first: no cloud model dependency in core logic
- Live trading is opt-in only (--live --confirm-risk)
- Credentials stored in macOS Keychain (service: "hyperbot")
- Install path default: ~/Desktop/Hyperbot with venv at .venv/
- Dashboard philosophy: simplicity over density, educational transparency, progressive disclosure
